item.title: What’s new in FL Cloud Pro?
item.dc:creator: Eric Brünjes
item.metadata:description: FL Cloud is growing with new plugins, even more exclusive sounds, and more FLEX Packs.

item.title: FLEX: Drift Phonk out now!
item.dc:creator: Eric Brünjes
item.metadata:description: Built to break the loop. This FLEX pack delivers overdriven drums, electronic bells, and saturated textures – all tuned to the distorted pulse of modern phonk. From Memphis roots to online mayhem, it captures the genre’s raw energy while pushing into wave, trap, and EDM territory.

item.title: FLEX: Beat Scene out now!
item.dc:creator: Eric Brünjes
item.metadata:description: Capture the raw, atmospheric soul of the L.A. Beat Scene with 125 presets inspired by Flying Lotus, Knxwledge, and Teebs. A sonic toolkit that pushes the boundaries of experimental hip-hop production.

item.title: What’s new in FL Cloud Pro?
item.dc:creator: Eric Brünjes
item.metadata:description: FL Cloud is growing with new plugins, new exclusive sounds, and more FLEX Packs.

item.title: What’s new in FL Studio 2025.2
item.dc:creator: Eric Brünjes
item.metadata:description: FL Studio 2025.2 brings more tools to start, shape, and finish your music.

item.title: FLEX | Euphoria
item.dc:creator: Eric Brünjes
item.description: A toolkit for peak-time festival anthems, Euphoria is loaded with expertly engineered presets that pack a stadium-sized impact. Open FLEX and check the STORE tab to purchase, just $14.95 (USD) or included with FL Cloud Pro. ﻿ Inside are 128 presets – deep basses, thick leads, fat chords, evolving pads...
item.content:encoded:
A toolkit for peak-time festival anthems, Euphoria is loaded with expertly engineered presets that pack a stadium-sized impact.

Open FLEX and check the STORE tab to purchase, just $14.95 (USD) or included with FL Cloud Pro.

Inside are 128 presets – deep basses, thick leads, fat chords, evolving pads – plus neuro-tinged bass design, morphing arpeggiators, and curated drum kits for instant idea generation.

Build drops that hit like Martin Garrix and Hardwell, lift crowds with Swedish House Mafia–style hooks, and color breakdowns in the vein of Alesso and David Guetta.

Crafted from custom wavetables and premium samples, every preset is mix-ready and optimized for fast arrangement, layering, and automation. Whether you’re chasing mainstage euphoria or radio-leaning crossover energy, this pack delivers the sound of today’s big-room and progressive EDM with precision and bite. 

Available now as a single purchase or included with FL Cloud Pro.

Euphoria contains 128 FLEX presets, including:

  • 24 Bass
  • 19 Pad
  • 17 Lead
  • 13 Synth
  • 11 Drum
  • 10 Sequence
  • 10 Key
  • 9 SFX
  • 7 Pluck
  • 3 Bell
  • 3 Arp
  • 2 Acid

Euphoria was created by Black Octopus Sound.

Available to purchase within FLEX in FL Studio or directly from Image-Line. The pack is also included in FL Cloud Pro. Find out more. 

Want to have your say about what FLEX packs we make in future?

Customers click through to our FLEX Pack Survey on the FL Studio Users forum (Looptalk) and vote now.

Enjoy!
item.metadata:description: A toolkit for peak-time festival anthems, Euphoria is loaded with 128 expertly engineered presets that pack a stadium-sized impact.

item.title: FLEX | Moon Dust
item.dc:creator: Eric Brünjes
item.description: Moon Dust delivers the next evolution of hip hop. A lush, atmospheric FLEX instrument inspired by the genre’s most influential producers. Open FLEX and check the STORE tab to purchase, just $14.95 (USD) or included with FL Cloud Pro. ﻿ Drawing from the sonic palettes of Travis Scott, Metro Boomin,...
item.content:encoded:
Moon Dust delivers the next evolution of hip hop. A lush, atmospheric FLEX instrument inspired by the genre’s most influential producers.

Open FLEX and check the STORE tab to purchase, just $14.95 (USD) or included with FL Cloud Pro.

Drawing from the sonic palettes of Travis Scott, Metro Boomin, and Mike Dean, Moon Dust blends soul-driven textures with futuristic synths, analog grit, and ambient depth. 

Expect warped synths, wavy keys, atmospheric arps, and moody pads, perfect for crafting modern beats with emotional weight and cinematic energy. Whether you’re building a downtempo ballad or a spaced-out banger, Moon Dust is your toolkit for future-sounding hip hop production.

Crafted from high-end studio synths and custom FX chains, every preset captures the essence of modern hip hop with timeless analog character. 

Available now as a single purchase or included with FL Cloud Pro.

Moon Dust contains 76 FLEX presets, including:

  • 28 synths
  • 18 keys
  • 13 pads
  • 8 bass
  • 4 plucks
  • and more

Moon dust was created by Grammy Award-winning producer, writer, and expert sound designer, Snipe Young.

FLEX is a preset-based synthesizer included free with FL Studio and driven by an advanced synthesis engine capable of Subtractive, Wavetable, Multisample, FM & AM based synthesis. The 8 Macros control custom synthesis targets, for each patch, and allow you to focus on what’s most important: making music. 

Available to purchase within FLEX in FL Studio or directly from Image-Line. The pack is also included in FL Cloud Pro. Find out more. 

Want to have your say about what FLEX packs we make in future?

Customers click through to our FLEX Pack Survey on the FL Studio Users forum (Looptalk) and vote now.

Enjoy!
item.metadata:description: The next evolution in hip hop production. Atmospheric textures, gritty synths, and moody pads for cinematic beats.

item.title: FLEX | Hard 808s
item.dc:creator: Eric Brünjes
item.description: Hard 808s is a FLEX pack built for producers who want their low end to hit hard! Packed with 100 playable 808 presets, this collection delivers cone-rattling subs, saturated glides, and aggressive, distorted one-shots. Whether you're working in trap, drill, hip-hop, rage, or any style that demands serious low-end pressure,...
item.content:encoded:
Hard 808s is a FLEX pack built for producers who want their low end to hit hard! Packed with 100 playable 808 presets, this collection delivers cone-rattling subs, saturated glides, and aggressive, distorted one-shots. Whether you're working in trap, drill, hip-hop, rage, or any style that demands serious low-end pressure, Hard 808s gives you the sound and control to shape bold, modern beats.

Open FLEX and check the STORE tab to purchase, just $14.95 (USD) or included with FL Cloud Pro.

Learn more about Hard 808s


From raw sub tones to harmonically rich textures, every preset is tuned to C for ease. Expect analog warmth, bit-crushed grit, pitch-perfect glide response, and the punch you need to cut through a mix.

Hard 808s contains 100 presets including:

  • 100 custom 808 presets all tuned to the key of C
  • Raw 808s, rumbling subs, tastefully distorted one-shots, and everything in between
  • Glide-ready presets with perfect pitch tracking
  • Layered textures: analog warmth and saturation, bit-crushed bite, and harmonic grit
  • FL Studio ready – no third-party plugins required
  • Ideal for producers crafting beats in trap, hiphop, drill, rage, phonk, R&B, and more

FLEX is a preset-based synthesizer included free with FL Studio and driven by an advanced synthesis engine capable of Subtractive, Wavetable, Multisample, FM & AM based synthesis. The 8 Macros control custom synthesis targets, for each patch, and allow you to focus on what’s most important: making music. 

Available to purchase within FLEX in FL Studio or directly from Image-Line. The pack is also included in FL Cloud Pro. Find out more. 

Created in collaboration with the renowned team at MSXII Sound Design. .

Want to have your say about what FLEX packs we make in future?

Customers click through to our FLEX Pack Survey on the FL Studio Users forum (Looptalk) and vote now.

Enjoy!
item.metadata:description: Packed with 100 playable 808 presets, Hard 808s is a FLEX pack built for producers who want their low end to hit hard.

item.title: FL Studio 2025 | Released
item.dc:creator: Eric Brünjes
item.description: Download the latest FL Studio update and get access to new features including: 500 Dynamic Mixer Tracks, Loop Starter, and Per-clip Audio Editing. Update now for free! Get FL Studio 2025 From first loop to final master, everything moves quicker with FL Studio 2025. See what’s new in the video...
item.content:encoded:
Download the latest FL Studio update and get access to new features including: 500 Dynamic Mixer Tracks, Loop Starter, and Per-clip Audio Editing. Update now for free!

Get FL Studio 2025

From first loop to final master, everything moves quicker with FL Studio 2025. See what’s new in the video below.

FL Studio 2025 key new features

  • Loop Starter: Instant, genre-based loops for generating ideas
  • Dynamic Mixer Tracks: Add or remove Mixer Tracks, with support for up to 500 tracks
  • Gopher: Multi-lingual studio assistant for answering FL Studio and music production-related questions
  • Improved Audio Clips: Stretch, pitch and reverse directly from the Clip Properties 
  • Emphasis: A new multi-stage limiter plugin for loud yet transparent results – exclusive to All Plugins Edition
  • Mobile Rack: 7 instruments and 29 effects from FL Studio Mobile, now in desktop – can be used stacked or solo
  • VFX Script plugin for turning Patcher setups into complex audio applications
  • FL Studio Remote Support: Seamlessly integrates with your workflow, replacing IL Remote with enhanced remote control capabilities
  • FLEX Enhancements: Includes a free 150 preset FLEX Pack – Melodic Techno
  • Bassline Generator: The new bassline mode in Chord Progression Tool gives instant basslines to pair with any progression
  • Vectorial UI Updates: Sleek, scalable vectorial interfaces for BassDrum, Sakura, Drumaxx, and more
item.metadata:description: Download our latest update and get access to new features like Dynamic Mixer Tracks, Loop Starter, and per-clip audio editing.

item.title: New series: Learn FL Studio
item.dc:creator: Eric Brünjes
item.description: Our new video series helps new users to quickly get to grips with beats, melodies, arranging and more. Made by popular YouTube creator, Synthet. Learn FL Studio The first five videos are out now, covering your first steps, making beats in Channel Rack, creating melodies in Piano Roll, layering audio...
item.content:encoded:
Our new video series helps new users to quickly get to grips with beats, melodies, arranging and more. Made by popular YouTube creator, Synthet. 

Learn FL Studio

The first five videos are out now, covering your first steps, making beats in Channel Rack, creating melodies in Piano Roll, layering audio loops, and arranging your track. Watch the first video below.

Created by Synthet and FL Studio

Synthet is an FL Studio creator making videos about all aspects of music production. Known for his inventive style and playful presentation, Synthet has amassed over 900,000 followers on YouTube, making him one of the most-loved FL Studio creators out there.
item.metadata:description: Our new video series helps you get to quickly grips with beats, melodies, arranging and more. Made with popular YouTube creator, Synthet.

item.title: FLEX | Harmony
item.dc:creator: Eric Brünjes
item.description: Harmony is a playable vocal instrument, created by legendary hitmakers Curtis "Sauce" Wilson and Rochad Holiday, that captures the silky smooth articulation of R&B, the dusty texture of chopped hip-hop samples, and the glossy finesse of modern pop production. Open FLEX and check the STORE tab to purchase, just $14.95...
item.content:encoded:
Harmony is a playable vocal instrument, created by legendary hitmakers Curtis "Sauce" Wilson and Rochad Holiday, that captures the silky smooth articulation of R&B, the dusty texture of chopped hip-hop samples, and the glossy finesse of modern pop production.

Open FLEX and check the STORE tab to purchase, just $14.95 (USD) or included with FL Cloud Pro.

Learn more about Harmony

Harnessing stacked vocal samples and emotive phrases, Harmony turns vocal performances into lush pads, intimate leads, deep basses, and ethereal textures. Each take is captured and shaped to preserve its human nuance — delivering tone, musicality, and soul in every layer.

It also includes RIFF presets for creating original vocal runs with chopped licks mapped to key and scale — ideal for fluid melodies, spontaneous hooks, or quick embellishments. Paired with FLEX’s intuitive macro controls, you can sculpt tone, dynamics, and movement — unlocking vocal moments that bring your ideas to life and let your music truly sing.

Harmony contains 100 presets including:

  • 42 Vocal pad presets
  • 15 Key-split Riff presets (Riffs in left hand, pads in right)
  • 11 Arp
  • 7 Leads & keys
  • 7 Multi-channel presets (for Piano roll note color switching)
  • 18 Multi-layered source presets (including raw and FX versions)

Harmony — vocals reimagined.

Created by Curtis "Sauce" Wilson and Rochad Holiday whose credits include: Brandy, Ariana Grande, Ne-Yo, Celine Dion, Will Smith, Musiq Soulchild, Eric Benét, Eric Bellinger, Coco Jones, Muni Long, K. Michelle, Mary J. Blige, Mario, Amerie, Queen Naija, Keyshia Cole, and Fantasia.

N.B: A few sounds in the audio demo are not part of the pack and were added for context and inspiration.

FLEX is a preset-based synthesizer included free with FL Studio and driven by an advanced synthesis engine capable of Subtractive, Wavetable, Multisample, FM & AM based synthesis. The 8 Macros control custom synthesis targets, for each patch, and allow you to focus on what’s most important: making music. 

Available to purchase within FLEX in FL Studio or directly from Image-Line. The pack is also included in FL Cloud Pro. Find out more. 

Want to have your say about what FLEX packs we make in future?

Customers click through to our FLEX Pack Survey on the FL Studio Users forum (Looptalk) and vote now.

Enjoy!
item.metadata:description: Harmony is a vocal instrument blending smooth R&B, dusty hip-hop textures, and polished modern pop.

item.title: FLEX | Hypertrance by nuphory
item.dc:creator: Eric Brünjes
item.description: Hypertrance by nuphory is a tribute to the golden era of trance — reimagined for today’s producers. Inspired by analog gear, this pack fuses vintage grit with modern clarity to deliver raw, emotional, high-energy sounds. Open FLEX and check the STORE tab to purchase, just $14.95 (USD) or included with...
item.content:encoded:
Hypertrance by nuphory is a tribute to the golden era of trance — reimagined for today’s producers.

Inspired by analog gear, this pack fuses vintage grit with modern clarity to deliver raw, emotional, high-energy sounds.

Open FLEX and check the STORE tab to purchase, just $14.95 (USD) or included with FL Cloud Pro.

Learn more about Hypertrance by nuphory


From lush pads and soaring supersaws to distorted bass and hypnotic arps, every preset captures the spirit of trance pioneers like Darude, Tiësto, and Ferry Corsten — as well as modern innovators like Ilan Bluestone and Maddix.

Whether you’re building a nostalgic throwback or a fresh take on trance, Hypertrance by nuphory gives you the tools to create music that moves. Perfect for trance, melodic techno, psy-influenced builds, and more.

Contains 100 Presets, including:

  • 11 acid
  • 37 basses
  • 12 chords
  • 25 leads
  • 15 pads

Bring the rave back. Feel the rush again. Create something euphoric.

FLEX is a preset-based synthesizer included free with FL Studio and driven by an advanced synthesis engine capable of Subtractive, Wavetable, Multisample, FM & AM based synthesis. The 8 Macros control custom synthesis targets, for each patch, and allow you to focus on what’s most important: making music. 

Available to purchase within FLEX in FL Studio or directly from Image-Line. The pack is also included in FL Cloud Pro. Find out more. 

nuphory is a music producer and FL Studio Power User. Find out more.
item.metadata:description: Hypertrance by nuphory is a FLEX Pack tribute to the golden era of trance — reimagined for today’s producers.

item.title: FLEX | Chill-Lo-Fi-2
item.dc:creator: Eric Brünjes
item.description: The long awaited follow up to Chill-Lo-Fi 1, immerse your beats into deep-sampled pianos, vintage digital keys, and cosy synth tones. Open FLEX and check the STORE tab to purchase, just $14.95 (USD) or included with FL Cloud Pro. Learn more about Chill-Lo-Fi-2 ﻿ Inside you’ll find felt-muted chords, picked...
item.content:encoded:
The long awaited follow up to Chill-Lo-Fi 1, immerse your beats into deep-sampled pianos, vintage digital keys, and cosy synth tones. Open FLEX and check the STORE tab to purchase, just $14.95 (USD) or included with FL Cloud Pro.

Learn more about Chill-Lo-Fi-2

Inside you’ll find felt-muted chords, picked and plucked textures, and warm, warbly leads pulled from classic FM and sample-based synths, early digital workstations, and crunchy vintage keyboards.

Whether they’re warmed with VHS or sent into orbit with custom reverbs, the sounds are lo-fi at its most lush — perfect for anything from fluttering melodies to gentle noise layers.

What's included

Chill-Lo-Fi 2 contains 195 presets, including:

  • 4 basses
  • 16 bells
  • 3 brass
  • 3 drum kits
  • 3 guitars
  • 98 keys
  • 10 pads
  • 12 plucks
  • 2 SFX
  • 40 synths
  • 4 winds

Inject new energy into your lo-fi productions.

FLEX is a preset-based synthesizer included free with FL Studio and driven by an advanced synthesis engine capable of Subtractive, Wavetable, Multisample, FM & AM based synthesis. The 8 Macros control custom synthesis targets, for each patch, and allow you to focus on what's most important: making music.

Available to purchase within FLEX in FL Studio or directly from Image-Line. The pack is also included in FL Cloud Pro. Find out more.
item.metadata:description: The long awaited follow up to Chill-Lo-Fi 1, immerse your beats into deep-sampled pianos, vintage digital keys, and cosy synth tones.

flstudio:en.UnlockLabel: Sign into your account to activate FL Studio
flstudio:en.CreateAccountLabel: Unlock FL Cloud extras; get news & more exclusive offers
flstudio:en.StartTrialLabel: Time unlimited access, but project loading is disabled
flstudio:en.PurchaseText: The license has expired. Open the shop to purchase a new one
